name: Anthropic
notes: Priority pilot org. Rich Tier 1 corpus: Claude's Character, model cards, RSP, system prompt.

name: OpenAI
notes: Priority pilot org. Key docs: Model Spec, GPT-4o system card, usage policies.

name: Google DeepMind
notes: Priority pilot org. Key docs: Gemini technical reports, Frontier Safety Framework.

name: Meta (FAIR)
notes: Priority pilot org. Key docs: Llama model cards, responsible use guide.

name: xAI
notes: Priority pilot org. Limited formal documentation; Grok system prompts (published/leaked).

name: Microsoft
notes: Extension set. Microsoft Research / Azure AI.

name: Mistral
notes: Extension set.

name: Cohere
notes: Extension set.

name: Amazon
notes: Extension set. AWS AI / Alexa.

name: Apple
notes: Extension set. Apple Intelligence / ML Research.

name: Inflection
notes: Extension set. Pi.

name: Stability AI
notes: Extension set.

name: Baidu
notes: Extension set. ERNIE. May have limited English-language documentation on these dimensions.

name: Alibaba
notes: Extension set. Qwen / DAMO Academy.

name: ByteDance
notes: Extension set. Doubao / Seed.

name: Apollo Research
notes: CWG paper comparison set. Scheming, alignment faking, sandbagging evaluations. Founded 2023 by Marius Hobbhahn.

name: METR
notes: CWG paper comparison set. Formerly ARC Evals (spun off Dec 2023). Dangerous capability evaluations, ARA methodology. Pre-deployment evals cited in commercial lab system cards.

name: Redwood Research
notes: CWG paper comparison set. AI control, alignment faking (with Anthropic), adversarial training. Founded 2021 by Buck Shlegeris and Nate Thomas.

name: Alignment Research Center
notes: CWG paper comparison set. Theoretical alignment research, formal mechanistic explanations. ARC Evals spun off as METR Dec 2023. Founded by Paul Christiano.

name: Machine Intelligence Research Institute
notes: CWG paper comparison set. Agent foundations, mesa-optimisation (historical). Pivoted to governance advocacy 2023-24. Founded 2000 by Eliezer Yudkowsky.
